attr.title: Caveblazers
attr.desc: Caveblazers is a challenging and brutal roguelike platformer. Journey into a mysterious cave, fighting orcs and goblins with an abundance of weapons and magical items! Make friends along the way, then watch in despair as they are crushed in to a bloody pulp under a troll's fist.
attr.inst: Purchase the game on Steam, open the Steam console and use this command to download the compatible version: download_depot 452060 452061 848592866728747997. Copy downloaded files into assets folder.
attr.inst_md: Purchase the game on [Steam](https://store.steampowered.com/app/452060/Caveblazers/), open the [Steam console](steam://open/console) and use this command to download the compatible version: `download_depot 452060 452061 848592866728747997`. Copy downloaded files into `assets` folder.
